subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! In these days the Most Exalted Pen hath preferred silence to utterance and hath accorded it precedence in the night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قلم اعلی این ایام صمت را بر نطق ترجیح داده و مقدم شمرده در لیالی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Word of God and human limitations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
